headline: What Netflix (NFLX)'s Sports, Dining and Kids Gaming Push Means For Shareholders
summary: In recent days, Netflix expanded its ecosystem with the launch of the ad‑free, in‑app‑purchase‑free kids’ gaming app Netflix Playground for under‑eights across multiple countries, while partners like EverPass Media and American Express/Resy announced new collaborations that extend Netflix’s live sports and “Chef’s Table” brand into commercial venues and real‑world dining experiences. At the same time, Netflix’s decision to exit its Warner Bros. Discovery bid, the resulting US$2.80 billion...
